title: GitHub Codespaces on iPad
content: Successfully configured a cloud-based development environment to manage my personal brand site using only an iPad Pro and Safari.

title: UAT Facilitation
content: When testing with a large audiance, negotiate a happy medium. You cannot please every stakeholder. Communicate expectations in advance and always emphasize that the intent of UAT is for an end user to test signed off requirements which have been developed into the product.
